options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <fileName>
options.description: Output DEF file name

options.name: -addHalfWireExtensionOnPin
options.description: Forces the zero-extension on pins to the default half-width extension

options.name: -allLayers
options.description: Writes out any wires and shapes on non-routing layers to SPECIALNETS section

options.name: -bumpAsPin
options.description: Writes bump cells as top-level pins in the PINS section

options.name: -cutRow
options.description: Cuts rows against placement obstructions, block halos, or power domain fence minimum gaps

options.name: -cut_pg_rail
options.description: Cut the pg rails

options.name: -earlyGlobalRoute
options.description: Writes information about the wires generated by Early Global Router to the NETS section of the DEF file

options.name: -flatten_via_pillar
options.description: Via pillars are flattened into separate individual vias.

options.name: -floorplan
options.description: Writes the floorplan data to the DEF file

options.name: -ioRow
options.description: Generates I/O rows based on I/O pad placement, and writes the I/O row information to the DEF file

options.name: -netlist
options.description: Writes the netlist to the DEF file

options.name: -noCoreCells
options.description: Excludes core cell information from the DEF file to reduce the data size for import into APD

options.name: -noPrintWildCard
options.description: Suppresses the use of the wildcard format to represent special net connectivity

options.name: -noSpecialNet
options.description: Excludes special net information from the DEF file

options.name: -noStdCells
options.description: Excludes placed and unplaced standard cell information from the DEF file

options.name: -noTracks
options.description: Excludes output track and gcell statements to the DEF file

options.name: -no_covered_wire_patch
options.description: Don't write out wire patch that is covered by a routing

options.name: -no_virtual_trim
options.description: Don't write out virtual trims

options.name: -outputMaskLayers
options.description: Output MASK data on specified layers only

options.name: -routing
options.description: Writes the routing information to the NETS section of the DEF file

options.name: -routing_to_specialnet
options.description: Write all regular NETS routing to the SPECIALNETS section

options.name: -scanChain
options.description: Writes scan chain information to the DEF file

options.name: -selected
options.description: Writes only the DEF header, selected instances in COMPONENTS section and routing on selected nets in SPECIALNETS/NETS section if -routing is also specified

options.name: -skip_trimmetal_layers
options.description: not write trimmetal shapes in FILLS section

options.name: -specialRouteUserClass
options.description: User Class for special route

options.name: -trimmetal_gap_fill
options.description: write trimmetal gap fills to a dummy net _TRIMMETAL_FILLS_RESERVERD in SPECIALNETS section

options.name: -unit
options.description: Unit per micron for the DEF file

options.name: -unplaced
options.description: Writes information about unplaced standard cells to the DEF file

options.name: -useEEQCellWithLibertyInfo
options.description: use EEQ cell with timing library info as the master cell of a leaf instance

options.name: -usedVia
options.description: Writes out used vias only to DEF file

options.name: -verilog_from_def_netlist_flow
options.description: Reconciles the names in the DEF and Verilog files generated by the loadDefFile command

options.name: -withShield
options.description: Writes out shield information to DEF file

options.name: -wrongway_routing_as_specialroute
options.description: Write wrong way routing in the SPECIALNETS section
